name: SCN-028 | Live Attack Chain: Credential Theft to Ransomware
description: Purpose-built Stage Dive scenario. Four-phase kill chain with visible attacker terminals and Desktop artifacts designed for on-stage demos. Phase 1: Recon (T1082). Phase 2: LSASS credential theft via comsvcs.dll — primary Sophos Intercept X trigger (T1003.001). Phase 3: Scheduled task persistence (T1053.005). Phase 4: Ransomware artifacts on Desktop (T1486). On the unmanaged VM all phases complete visibly. On the Sophos-protected VM, Intercept X blocks at Phase 2 and fires a critical alert.
